sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11617" key="a)pa/thtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπάτητος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[πᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n11617.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">untrodden,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.51</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n11617.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not trodden down</tr_>: hence metaph., <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unusual,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0161.tlg001:131" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Democr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">131</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
